scene.message: SP: What was I even born{nl} for...{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: What's gotten into{nl} these people?{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: Good thing those weird{nl} signals stopped.{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Every last one of them{nl} talking like Kandori!!{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Finally came to their{nl} senses, huh.{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: We must stop Kandori{nl} as soon as we possibly can!{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: What were we born{nl} for...{wait_fr:30}...{wait_fr:30} hm.{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: It's scary. Let's get{nl} out, quick.{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: Oh good~{waitkey}Everyone's eyes are back to{nl} normal.{waitkey}{ret}
Brown: Those signals are{nl} scary, huh.{waitkey}Seriously.{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: There's no use staying{nl} here.{waitkey}Let's hurry on ahead.{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: There's no use staying{nl} here.{waitkey}Let's hurry on ahead.{waitkey}{ret}
Reiji: All of them spouting{nl} the same nonsense.{waitkey}{ret}
